about.title: Tell us about yourself
about.subtitle: Start by providing your basic information to help students get to know you. This information will be visible on your public profile.

fields.subjectHelper: You can add more subjects later in your profile settings.
fields.cvHelper: Upload your CV so we can review your professional background.
fields.cvHint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, PDF, DOCX. Max size: {max}MB.

about.privacyDescription: We don't share your private contact information with students until you've accepted a lesson request. Your email and phone number are kept secure.

validation.countryFromList: Please select a country from the list
validation.subjectFromList: Please select a subject from the list
validation.languagesFromList: Please select a language from the list
validation.proficiencyFromList: Please select a proficiency level from the list
validation.cvInvalidType: CV must be JPG, PNG, PDF, DOC, or DOCX
validation.cvUploadFailed: Failed to upload CV. Please try again.

preview.title: How students will see your profile
preview.hint: Updates automatically as you complete each step.
preview.introPlaceholder: Your introduction will appear here once you add it in the Photo step.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.title: Your profile photo
avatar.subtitle: We will use your current Mezon avatar for your tutor profile.
avatar.syncedNote: This avatar is synced from Mezon.
avatar.manualSyncNote: You can update it and manually sync from Mezon after approval.

photo.title: Upload your profile photo
photo.subtitle: A professional, friendly photo helps you get up to 5x more students and builds immediate trust.
photo.cardSubtitle: Add a headline and a short intro so students can get to know you better. This information will be visible on your public profile.
photo.uploadHint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG. Max size: 5MB. Drag and drop or click to upload.

identity.title: Update Identity Documents
identity.subtitle: Upload your ID card, national ID, or passport to verify your identity.
identity.tipsTitle: Tips for Taking Identity Document Photos

clear.title: Clear Photo
clear.description: Make sure the text and numbers on the document are clearly visible and not blurry.

noReflection.title: No Glare or Reflection
noReflection.description: Avoid lighting reflections that may obscure information on the document.

fullDocument.title: Show the Entire Document
fullDocument.description: Capture all four corners of the document within the frame.

validDocument.title: Valid Document
validDocument.description: Use a valid ID card, national ID, or passport that has not expired.

fields.motivatePlaceholder: Share what drives you to help students
fields.introducePlaceholder: Briefly describe your experience and teaching style

centered.title: Centered & Close-up
centered.description: Face should be centered and fill about 60% of the frame.

lighting.title: Good Lighting
lighting.description: Ensure your face is clearly lit. Avoid harsh shadows or backlighting.

expression.title: Friendly Expression
expression.description: A warm smile makes you more approachable to potential students.

background.title: Neutral Background
background.description: Solid or simple backgrounds work best to keep focus on you.

validation.photoInvalidType: Photo must be JPG or PNG
validation.identityInvalidType: Identity photo must be JPG or PNG
validation.identityInvalidSize: Identity photo must be smaller than {max}MB

teaching.certificatePlaceholder: e.g. TEFL, TESOL, CELTA, DELF, HSK, JLPT, TOPIK
teaching.reviewDescription: All certificates are manually verified by our team within 48 hours. Please ensure the document is clear and shows your full name and completion date.

validation.certificateFileInvalidType: Certificate file must be PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, or DOCX
validation.certificateFileTooLarge: Certificate file must be smaller than {max}MB
validation.certificateUploadFailed: Certificate upload failed, please try again
validation.educationFileInvalidType: Diploma file must be PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, or DOCX
validation.educationFileTooLarge: Diploma file must be smaller than {max}MB
validation.educationUploadFailed: Diploma upload failed, please try again

video.title: Video introduction
video.subtitle: Introduce yourself to students with a short video to increase your profile visibility by up to 3x.
video.previewPlaceholder: Your video preview will appear here after you upload or add a link.
video.methodNotice: Choose one of the two options below — upload a video file or paste a YouTube link.

upload.label: Upload your introduction video
upload.hint: MP4, MOV, or WebM · up to {maxSize}MB · max {maxMinutes}:00
upload.emptyLabel: Click or drag and drop your video
upload.youtubeNotice: When your profile is approved, your video will be published publicly on Mezonly's YouTube channel.
upload.success: Video uploaded successfully. It will be published to YouTube after admin approval.

bestPractices: Record in a quiet, well-lit space
Introduce your experience and teaching style
avoidItems: Music that's louder than your voice

errors.invalidLink: Video link must be a valid YouTube URL.
errors.tooLong: Video must be 2 minutes or shorter.
errors.missingBeforeContinue: Please add a video under 2 minutes before continuing.
errors.invalidVideoType: Please upload an MP4, MOV, or WebM video.
errors.uploadFailed: Video upload failed. Please try again.

availability.title: Availability & Pricing
availability.subtitle: Set your weekly schedule and your hourly tutoring rate to finish your profile.

rate.question: How much do you want to charge per hour?
rate.recommended: Recommended: at least {min} for your subjects.

validation.hourlyRateInvalidFormat: Hourly rate must be a valid number (up to 2 decimal places).
validation.hourlyRateGreaterThanZero: Hourly rate must be greater than 0.
validation.weeklySlotsRequired: Please add at least one weekly availability slot before continuing.
validation.timeRequired: Start time and end time are required.
validation.endTimeMustBeAfterStartTime: End time must be after start time.
validation.duplicateSlot: The same time slot was added twice on {day}. Please remove the duplicate.
validation.overlappingSlot: Time slots on {day} overlap with each other. Please adjust the times.
validation.currencyConversionFailed: Failed to convert currency. Please try again later.
validation.submitFailed: Failed to submit your application. Please try again.
